architecture: Three role-topic groups by three discovery lanes, six curated queries.

provenance.note: Generated from saved completed-run outputs by build_sanitized_demo_data.py.

queries.expected_false_positives: Big-lab/product announcements, tutorials about MCP, and generic 'we now support X' marketing.
queries.expected_strong_signals: Launch/OSS posts linking a repo, docs, or live endpoint for an agent runtime or serving layer.
queries.objective: Find people shipping agent/AI-infrastructure primitives (runtimes, MCP servers, model serving) right now.
queries.query: (agent runtime OR "MCP server" OR "model context protocol" OR orchestration OR "model serving" OR "inference server") ("just launched" OR "just shipped" OR "open sourced" OR "open-sourced" OR "now in beta" OR "now available")

queries.expected_false_positives: Listicles, 'top 10 AI tools' threads, and incumbent feature launches.
queries.expected_strong_signals: A founder shipping a tool with a repo/demo/docs in an AI dev-tools category.
queries.objective: Find AI-native developer/infra tools (coding, testing, DevOps, observability, security) at launch/OSS moment.
queries.query: ("AI coding" OR "code review" OR "AI testing" OR devops OR observability OR "incident response" OR "AI security") ("just launched" OR "just shipped" OR "open sourced" OR "open-sourced" OR "now in beta")

queries.expected_false_positives: Job-board reposts, recruiters, and generic 'excited to start something new' with no domain fit.
queries.expected_strong_signals: Named ex-operator/eng announcing a new company or seeking a cofounder/founding engineer in-scope.
queries.objective: Surface credible founders/builders transitioning into AI infra or dev tools, including stealth.
queries.query: (agent OR "AI infrastructure" OR "developer tools" OR observability OR "AI security") ("building in stealth" OR "left my job" OR "starting something new" OR "looking for a cofounder" OR "founding engineer")

queries.expected_false_positives: Aspirational 'looking for design partners' with no product, and vendor case-study marketing.
queries.expected_strong_signals: Founder describing a first customer / production deployment, or a user describing real usage.
queries.objective: Find AI dev/infra tools showing earliest adoption (design partners, first customers, production use).
queries.query: ("AI coding" OR "code review" OR devops OR observability OR "AI security" OR "data engineering") ("design partners" OR "first customer" OR "in production" OR "migrated from" OR "users asked")

queries.expected_false_positives: Consulting/agency 'we automate your back office', and no-code influencer content.
queries.expected_strong_signals: Vertical-AI founder citing a first customer or production workflow replacing manual/service spend.
queries.objective: Find AI-native enterprise-workflow / systems-of-action products with earliest customer pull.
queries.query: ("vertical AI" OR "workflow automation" OR "AI agent for" OR "AI copilot for" OR "back office") ("design partners" OR "first customer" OR "in production" OR "migrated from")

queries.expected_false_positives: Automation-agency promos, generic 'future of work' commentary, and SI/consulting pitches.
queries.expected_strong_signals: Founder announcing a vertical-AI company/launch or hiring a founding engineer for one.
queries.objective: Surface founders launching or building (incl. stealth) AI-native enterprise-workflow companies.
queries.query: ("vertical AI" OR "workflow automation" OR "AI agent for" OR "systems of action" OR "back office") ("building in stealth" OR "founding engineer" OR "just launched" OR "design partner")
